title: TaCZ-Labs
description: An addon of Timeless and Classics Zero
body:
~~（this feature has been implemented by tacz）Have you noticed that TaCZ can't run and shoot? That's okay, this module now implements this simple feature.
~~

TaCZ: Labs has created a new set of collimators for TaCZ based on the game PUBG! The new collimators feature silky smooth dynamics and a wealth of configuration options for you to tweak, including the all-important ARGB color palette! Don't like it? You can make it static or turn it off! You'll also be able to choose the collimator for each gun individually.

For edit settings anytime, please install cloth config.

This mod uses the same GPL v3 license as TaCZ.

Wish you can enjoy my mod :) !
